<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Util; use const DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR; use function basename; use function dirname; use function is_dir; use function mkdir; use function realpath; use function str_starts_with; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class Filesystem { public static function createDirectory(string $directory): bool { return !(!is_dir($directory) && !@mkdir($directory, 0o777, true) && !is_dir($directory)); } /** * @param non-empty-string $path * * @return false|non-empty-string */ public static function resolveStreamOrFile(string $path): false|string { if (str_starts_with($path, 'php://') || str_starts_with($path, 'socket://')) { return $path; } $directory = dirname($path); if (is_dir($directory)) { return realpath($directory) . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . basename($path); } return false; } }
